Still a fine app. With the ten year anniversary on the horizon, there are things I would fix, though. For one thing, the sounds and music need to be upgraded. With the game's sounds being compressed for around 9 years now, it is absolutely time for an upgrade. Phones are stronger than they used to be, and with how other Pokémon mobile games use high quality sounds and music, there is no excuse for GO anymore. Please update the sound and music! The cries especially should not be so compressed.
